# NaliGrid

**The premium event management platform built for Nigeria. Ready for Africa.**

Replace WhatsApp threads, Excel sheets, and endless phone calls with one unified platform covering the full event lifecycle — from first client inquiry through to post-event analysis.

---

## Products

| Product | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| [NaliGrid](https://naligrid.com) | Multi-role SaaS for planners, coordinators, vendors, and clients |
| Client Portal | Token-based read-only event visibility (no account required) |
| Live Board | Real-time event day status monitoring |
| Aftermath Reports | Post-event PDF reports, media library, and issue logs |

## Our Stack

React 19 · Vite · Supabase (Auth, PostgreSQL, Realtime, Storage, Edge Functions) · Paystack · Korapay · Zustand · CSS Modules
